nasb.text: Then Mordecai returned to the king’s gate. But Haman hurried home, mourning, with his head covered.

esv.text: Then Mordecai returned to the king’s gate. But Haman hurried to his house, mourning and with his head covered.

cnv.text: 末底改仍回到御門那裡；哈曼卻急急忙忙回了家，帶著悲哀的心蒙著頭。

ccb.text: 之后，末底改回到宫门那里，哈曼却悲伤地蒙着头匆匆回家去了。
